tsconfig_exclusions.impact: tsconfig.json includes the entire source tree; no files are explicitly skipped from compilation.

orchestration_issues.issue: Factory builder is never imported and does not expose mappings for TaskType -> agent config.
orchestration_issues.suggested_fix: Either remove agentFactory.ts or wire its builder into orchestration with exported create/get functions.

orchestration_issues.issue: Service layer assembles prompts by reaching into agents/taskInstructions instead of using orchestration.
orchestration_issues.suggested_fix: Expose a dedicated orchestration facade that returns prompts and metadata for services to call Gemini.

ui_integration_gaps.issue: UI bypasses orchestration and invokes services directly, so collaboration graph and cache strategy are unused.
ui_integration_gaps.suggested_fix: Route task submission through orchestration helpers (e.g., aiAgentOrchestra facade) and keep UI pure.
